title: Craft Nest
description: Adds crafting recipes for uncraftable items.
body:
🪺 **Craft Nest**

Craft Nest makes Minecraft crafting more immersive and realistic.

Many items in vanilla Minecraft cannot be crafted at all — such as Saddles, Obsidian, and other special items.
With Craft Nest, these limitations are removed through logical and balanced crafting recipes that fit naturally into survival gameplay.

✨ Features:

Adds crafting recipes for previously uncraftable items

Recipes are designed to feel realistic and survival-friendly

No overpowered shortcuts — progression stays balanced

Lightweight and compatible with most mods

Craft smarter. Craft deeper. Craft like it makes sense.

![CraftNest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f366adc1ddcb4866602516a3482c532388e69a.png)
